title: MxC Skills Portal: Roadmap refresh, chatbot widget & portal fixes
head: fix/mxc-portal-safe-path
body:
## Summary

- **Real MXG roadmap data** — replaced LeanIX placeholders with 25 live Signavio MXG features from the ProductBoard M&C external+internal board (CSV export 2026-05-05), grouped across Legacy Process Manager, Suite Repository, and Process Modeler
- **JS syntax fix** — repaired critical U+2019 smart-quote bug in `ROADMAP_DATA` that silently broke the entire Roadmap tab (Roadmap tab was rendering blank)
- **MxC Assistant chatbot** — fully client-side chat widget (no API key required) that answers questions about skills, roadmap, and the portal using the embedded `SKILLS_DATA`, `ROADMAP_DATA`, and `FAQ_DATA` arrays
- **Portal metadata** — OG description corrected (57 skills to 50 skills), `lastUpdated` updated to 2026-05-05

## Roadmap now — 25 MXG features

| Area | NOW | NEXT | LATER |
|---|---|---|---|
| Legacy Process Manager | 1 | 2 | 4 |
| Suite Repository | 3 | 1 | 5 |
| Process Modeler | 5 | 1 | 3 |

Data source: M&C-external-+-internal.csv (ProductBoard board export, 2026-05-05). Teams: Process Guardians, Roots, The Sims, Dictionary, Process Pioneers, Process Vanguards, Kestrel.

## Chatbot capabilities

- Skill name lookup with fuzzy word scoring (all 50 skills + 8 scenarios)
- Category browse (8 categories: Process & BPMN, Analytics & Insights, Planning & Backlog, Documents & Delivery, Communication, Strategy & Coaching, SPM Knowledge, Productivity)
- Roadmap queries by area or status (NOW / NEXT / LATER)
- FAQ keyword matching (12 Q&A pairs)
- 6 quick-reply chips on open for common questions
- Graceful fallback with suggested queries

## Test plan

- [ ] Roadmap tab loads and shows 3 area columns with NOW/NEXT/LATER entries (was blank before the quote fix)
- [ ] Chat bubble appears bottom-right corner; clicking opens the panel
- [ ] Chat: type "what is now" — returns 9 in-progress features with area labels
- [ ] Chat: type "bpmn annotator" — returns skill description and command
- [ ] Chat: type "suite repository roadmap" — returns grouped features for that area
- [ ] Skill cards with ProductBoard links show the "PB arrow" badge
- [ ] Roadmap items with insightsCount show the PB insights badge
- [ ] `docs/MxC/mxc-skills.html` and `marketplace/MxC/mxc-skills.html` are byte-for-byte identical
